messages.content: Hi there, please be a senior sapui5 developer and answer my question with working code example.
Sure, I'd be happy to help. What is your question?
How can I add a new item in the column menu in sap.ui.table? I want to add a clear filter option when user click it, it will reset the filter of the current column.
It seems the item is added on top of the menu. Can it be at last item in the menu?
It still appears on top of the menu list.
Is there any way to put it in the same line of the filter where I set by filterproperty attribute for the column?
Can I add the clear filter item as a button with icon and put it in the same line as the filterproperty item?
When I add the custom item, it alwasy added at the index0. It seems when I add it the menu items is not loaded. How can you solve this problem.
Can you prevent that each time it opens, the menu item will be added. I want it add only once.
In this way, the first time the item will still be added on index 0
Can I add the clear filter item as a button after the default filter in menu item?
can the button appears after the default filter input?
No I want the default filter remain the same, but add a nother icon button after the filter's input in the menu items popup.
But in this case, they are not in the same line. I want they be in the same line.
